title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team used Claude Code to achieve rapid growth from $1B to $19B valuation in 14 months. He identifies four core strategies: automating existing workflows, making sub-threshold work economically viable, building bespoke tools, and using AI as a thought partner.
